narrative:
Precinct Wash D (precinct in Scioto County) has 298 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.8%, a modest Republican lean of 5.7 percentage points.
